hooks.command: cd /Users/haesuyoun/Desktop/NahunPersonalFolder/Better-Alarm && git diff --quiet HEAD 2>/dev/null && exit 0; FILES=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | head -3 | xargs -I{} basename {} | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//'); git add -A && git commit -m "fix: ${FILES:-변경사항 자동 커밋}" 2>/dev/null || true
